name: Ellen DeGeneres
bio: Ellen DeGeneres is an American comedian, actress, and television host known for her clean, conversational observational stand-up. She gained national attention with a 1986 appearance on The Tonight Show, on which she became the first female comedian invited to sit with Johnny Carson after a debut set, and later hosted the long-running daytime talk show The Ellen DeGeneres Show. Her later career was marked by workplace-conduct allegations that preceded the shows 2022 end.

timeline.ev: Named Showtimes Funniest Person in America
Debut on The Tonight Show; first female comic invited to Carsons couch
Stars in the ABC sitcom Ellen
The Ellen DeGeneres Show daytime talk show premieres
The Ellen DeGeneres Show ends after 19 seasons

accolades: Kennedy Center Mark Twain Prize for American Humor (2012)
Won more than 30 Daytime Emmy Awards
First female comedian invited to sit with Johnny Carson after a debut set
